name: GOLFTEC Houston Galleria
address: 2111 W Loop S Suite 230, Houston, TX 77027
about: GOLFTEC Houston Galleria is a technology-driven golf training center focused on lessons, club fitting, and practice. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven coaching. Lessons and fittings are led by PGA-certified coaches in individual training bays. The center also offers a pro shop with custom club fittings and a 10% discount on retail gear. Appointments can be booked online, and policies include a 30-day refund window for lesson plans and a 24-hour cancellation policy.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Access to PGA-certified coaches for personalized lesson plans
On-site club fitting with a 21-yard average distance increase
Indoor training with immediate video feedback
Pro shop with 10% off retail prices

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs, but the facility also provides club rentals and offers custom club fitting services with top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services, so outside items likely cannot be brought in.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time is not specified, but the focus is on lessons and practice rather than full simulator rounds.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and coaching services for young golfers.
